---
title: "Miscalibrations in judgements of attractiveness with cosmetics"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Kramer, R., & Ward, R."
year: 2014
date: 2014-01-01
pub-journal: "The Quarterly Journal of Experimental Psychology"
volume: "67(10)"
pages: "2060–2068"
doi: "10.1080/17470218.2014.908932"
pdf: "assets/papers/2014/jones_etal_2014.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, attractiveness]
---
